title: Uruguayan Chocolate Mousse
description: A rich, decadent dessert featuring the bold flavors of Uruguay and the creaminess of chocolate mousse.
instructions: In a double boiler or a heatproof bowl set over a pot of simmering water, melt the chocolate, stirring occasionally.
Remove the melted chocolate from the heat and let it cool slightly.
In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until it begins to thicken.
Add the softened butter, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract to the whipped cream and continue whipping until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and a splash of the cooled chocolate until well combined.
Gently fold the egg mixture into the whipped cream mixture until no white streaks remain.
Fold the remaining chocolate into the cream mixture until well combined.
Pour the mousse into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until set.
Serve chilled and garnish with whipped cream or chocolate shavings if desired.
